title: castanopsis chrysophylla subsp. minor
intro: Castanopsis chrysophylla subsp. minor, also known as the Minor Castanopsis or Chinese Castanopsis, is a subspecies of evergreen tree in the family Fagaceae. It is native to Asia and is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The plant is valued for its health benefits, which include reducing fever, relieving pain, and supporting respiratory health. Castanopsis chrysophylla subsp. minor is typically prepared as an herbal tea or infusion by steeping the leaves and branches in hot water, and can also be used in traditional Chinese medicine preparations such as decoctions and infusions.
